features.description: Thread an `LlmBackend` from `swell-daemon` into `Orchestrator` so the production runtime can construct reachable execution dependencies. Derived from `01_daemon_orphaned_wiring.md` and `04_tier1_blockers.md`.
expectedBehavior: `swell-daemon` depends on the runtime crates needed to construct a real execution path
`Daemon::new` accepts an injected LLM dependency or equivalent execution dependency builder
`Orchestrator` stores the injected LLM or production dependencies instead of staying disconnected
verificationSteps: Record mission checkback with production caller, validation IDs, commands run, and gate status

features.description: Construct `ExecutionController` inside `Orchestrator` and add the production dispatch loop that actually runs approved tasks. Derived from `01_daemon_orphaned_wiring.md`, `02_execution_path_gaps.md`, and `04_tier1_blockers.md`.
expectedBehavior: `Orchestrator` owns a production `ExecutionController`
tasks entering `Ready` are dispatched into the real execution pipeline
submitting and approving a task through the daemon path results in runtime execution

features.description: Wire `ValidationOrchestrator` into the real execution epilogue so runtime success depends on the audited validation path, not only local default validation. Derived from `02_execution_path_gaps.md`, `04_tier1_blockers.md`, and `07_integration_test_strategy.md`.
expectedBehavior: `ExecutionController` holds a reachable `ValidationOrchestrator`
generator output is validated through the production validation orchestrator before task success

features.description: Install `WorktreePool`, allocate per-task worktrees, and commit validated changes on success using task-linked branch and commit metadata. Derived from `03_git_worktree_orphaned.md`, `04_tier1_blockers.md`, and `07_integration_test_strategy.md`.

features.description: Enforce Tier 1 gate completion and strict machine-readable progress/checkback tracking for audited runtime wiring work, including witness/ignore hygiene review. This feature exists because flaky workers and validators require explicit ownership of gate state and progress evidence.
expectedBehavior: strict machine-readable progress checkbacks are updated for each Tier 1 feature
witness/ignore hygiene is reviewed and recorded
Tier 1 gate status is set only when all Tier 1 assertions are green
verificationSteps: Review progress-checkbacks.json and validation-state.json for complete Tier 1 evidence
Record mission checkback with production caller, validation IDs, commands run, and gate status
